summary: Phase 1 bug fixes tested successfully. All 18 backend tests passed. Admin dashboard pages (Users, Orders, Categories, Tiles) load correctly without BACKEND_URL crash. Deactivation with active:false now works for categories, tiles, and tiers. Valentine's package APIs return content. Google OAuth login required for homepage tile interaction testing.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Bug Fix #1 VERIFIED: BACKEND_URL undefined crash fixed - getBackendUrl() used correctly in AdminDashboard.jsx lines 527, 534, 712
✓ Bug Fix #2 VERIFIED: Deactivation working - model_dump(exclude_unset=True) preserves active:false values in all PUT handlers
✓ Bug Fix #3 VERIFIED: Valentine's package APIs return content - GET /api/admin/public/package/{id} works for all 3 packages
✓ Bug Fix #4 VERIFIED: Checkout DB lookup fixed - request.app.state.db used as primary source in niro_simplified/routes.py line 413
✓ Bug Fix #5 VERIFIED: CatalogManager error messages improved - maps technical errors to user-friendly text
✓ Valentine's category visible in admin (order 0) with proper tiles
✓ Frontend routing correct - linkedPackageId tiles navigate to PackageLandingPage
seed_data_creation: Test data for deactivation tests (TEST_deactivation_category, TEST_deactivation_tile, TEST_deactivation_tier) created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 bug fixes all verified. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_phase1_bug_fixes.py covers: admin login, deactivation fix (active:false), Valentine's package APIs, homepage data API, admin dashboard endpoints. Frontend Google OAuth login required for homepage tile navigation testing - cannot verify Valentine's tile clicks without actual Google auth flow.

frontend_ui_tests.admin_users_page: PASS - No crash, table loads with 455 users
frontend_ui_tests.admin_orders_page: PASS - No crash, table loads with 31 orders

bug_1_backend_url_undefined.evidence: Users and Orders pages load without crash, Export CSV uses getBackendUrl()

bug_2_deactivation_broken.evidence: PUT with {active:false} returns active:false in response, verified by GET

bug_3_valentines_tiles_content.evidence: All 3 Valentine's package APIs return ok:true with content

bug_4_checkout_db_lookup.evidence: Code review confirms request.app.state.db used first, orders table shows Valentine's packages

bug_5_catalogmanager_errors.evidence: Code review confirms error mapping in handleSave() and handleDelete()
